limit.description: Number of results to return per page.

offset.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

template_id.description: Filter to a specific template by its template_id. Deprecated templates are excluded from list results; use the retrieve endpoint to look up a template by ID regardless of status.

type.description: Filter by template type (e.g. destination, email, sms_provider, broadcast). Defaults to destination if neither type nor types is provided.

types.description: Comma-separated list of template types to include (e.g. destination,email,sms_provider).
